text: This article, except section three hundred thirty-nine thereof, shall not apply to any judgment in a civil action or cause of action arising out of an accident occurring prior to the effective date of this article.
markdown:
# Vehicle & Traffic Law
## Title 3
#### Article 7. Motor Vehicle Safety Responsibility Act
##### § 366 — Past application of article

This article, except section three hundred thirty-nine thereof, shall not apply to any judgment in a civil action or cause of action arising out of an accident occurring prior to the effective date of this article.

*Last modified: Sep. 22, 2014*
